actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: In life, there will always be winners and losers.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Life has a beginning, a middle and an end.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: In life, one has to follow the rules of the game.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: To live life, one must roll the dice.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: In life there are opponents one must win against.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Without rules, life is a free-for-all.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: When you die, the game is over.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Life is dealt with by the players.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: If you have a life, then you will have something to play.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Sometimes if you cheat in life, others will not want to play with you.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: If you cheat in life, you may disqualify yourself the rewards of winning.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Don't hate the player, hate life.
